name: World's Best Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Linda in Corona, CA Preparation Time: 2:00
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. Cream the butter and sugars together
in a large bowl. Add the eggs and the vanilla and beat thoroughly.
In a separate bowl, sift together the salt, soda and flour. Mix the
flour mixture into the liquid mixture one third at a time, to form the
dough. Add the semi-sweet chocolate chips and the nuts to the cookie
dough. Fold in by hand until well mixed.
Drop the cookie dough onto parchment-lined cookie sheets by the
tablespoon full. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F. oven for 10 to 12
minutes. BAKE NO MORE THAN 12 MINUTES! Do not brown or cookies will dry
out too much!!
NOTES: This recipe makes absolutely wonderful cookies! Tested and true,
always a hit with kids and even the biggest kids. The recipe makes a
HUGE batch, so it may be advisable to cut the recipe in half for most
occasions.
